_comment: SPL.go Cookbook Catalog — mirrors cookbook_catalog.json but uses 'spl-go' binary. Recipes requiring --tools (Python) or claude_cli adapter are disabled until spl-go gains those features.

_schema.is_active: bool   — included in default batch run (python run_all.py --catalog-file cookbook/cookbook_catalog_go.json)
_schema.approval_status: string — new | approved | wip | disabled | rejected

recipes.name: Hello World
recipes.description: Minimal SPL program — verify spl-go + adapter + model work

recipes.name: Ollama Proxy
recipes.description: General-purpose LLM query — proxy any Ollama model
args: prompt=Explain quantum computing in one sentence

recipes.name: Multilingual Greeting
recipes.description: Greet in any language — parametric context demo

recipes.name: Model Showdown
recipes.description: Same prompt to multiple models — compare output and latency via parallel CTEs
args: prompt=Write a poem about Spring season

recipes.name: Self-Refine
recipes.description: Iterative improvement: draft → critique → refine loop

recipes.name: ReAct Agent
recipes.description: Requires claude_cli adapter + --tools (Python) — not yet supported in spl-go

recipes.name: Safe Generation
recipes.description: Exception handling for production LLM safety

recipes.name: RAG Query
recipes.description: Retrieval-augmented generation — requires: spl-go doc-rag add <doc> + ChromaDB + Ollama

recipes.name: Chain of Thought
recipes.description: Multi-step reasoning: Research → Analyze → Summarize

recipes.name: Batch Test
recipes.description: Automated testing of cookbook recipes across models via parallel CTEs

recipes.name: Debate Arena
recipes.description: Adversarial debate between two LLM personas with a judge

recipes.name: Plan and Execute
recipes.description: Planner decomposes task into steps, executor runs each one
args: task=Build a REST API for a todo app

recipes.name: Map-Reduce Summarizer
recipes.description: Requires --tools (Python) — not yet supported in spl-go
args: document=The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This is a test document for map-reduce summarization.

recipes.name: Multi-Agent Collaboration
recipes.description: Researcher → Analyst → Writer collaboration via PROCEDURE

recipes.name: Code Review
recipes.description: Multi-pass review: security, performance, style, bugs

recipes.name: Reflection Agent
recipes.description: Meta-cognitive loop: solve → reflect → correct until confident

recipes.name: Tree of Thought
recipes.description: Explore multiple reasoning paths, score and pick the best
args: problem=Should we rewrite the legacy system or incrementally refactor?

recipes.name: Guardrails Pipeline
recipes.description: Input/output safety pipeline with PII detection and filtering

recipes.name: Memory Conversation
recipes.description: Persistent memory across conversations via memory.get/set
args: user_input=My name is Alice and I am a data scientist

recipes.name: Ensemble Voting
recipes.description: Generate multiple answers, score and vote for consensus

recipes.name: Multi-Model Pipeline
recipes.description: Per-step model selection with GENERATE...USING MODEL and quality loop

recipes.name: Text2SPL Demo
recipes.description: Natural language → SPL compiler demo via spl-go text2spl

recipes.name: Structured Output
recipes.description: CREATE FUNCTION with JSON schema — extract typed data from free text
args: text=John Smith, 42, joined Acme Corp in March 2021 earning $95,000/year

recipes.name: Few-Shot Prompting
recipes.description: Gold-standard examples embedded in SELECT context — in-context learning
args: text=The quarterly results exceeded all analyst forecasts by a significant margin

recipes.name: Nested Procedures
recipes.description: PROCEDURE calling PROCEDURE — deep composability without external orchestration

recipes.name: Prompt A/B Test
recipes.description: CTEs + EVALUATE scoring — compare two prompt variants, pick winner automatically
args: prompt_b=Give a technical explanation with analogies

recipes.name: Data Extraction
recipes.description: Pull structured fields from messy text — names, dates, amounts, references
args: text=Please process payment of USD 4,250.00 to Riverside Consulting (ref: PO-8821) by end of March.

recipes.name: Customer Support Triage
recipes.description: Classify → route → draft response in one workflow
args: ticket=My account has been charged twice for the same order #12345

recipes.name: Meeting Notes to Actions
recipes.description: Transcript in, structured TODO list + owners out
args: transcript=Alice: we need to fix the login bug before Friday. Bob: I'll handle it. Alice: also need to update the docs

recipes.name: Code Generator + Tests
recipes.description: Generate a function then generate its unit tests in one workflow
args: spec=A function that validates an email address

recipes.name: Sentiment Pipeline
recipes.description: Batch sentiment over a list, aggregate trend statistics
args: items=Great product, love it! | Terrible experience, never again | It was okay I guess

recipes.name: Socratic Tutor
recipes.description: Ask guiding questions rather than giving answers — persona-constrained generation
args: topic=Why does the sky appear blue?

recipes.name: Interview Simulator
recipes.description: Two-persona structured Q&A with per-question scoring and overall evaluation

recipes.name: Progressive Summarizer
recipes.description: Layered summary: sentence → paragraph → page with fidelity verification
args: text=Artificial intelligence has transformed industries from healthcare to finance, enabling automation of complex tasks that previously required human expertise. Machine learning models can now diagnose diseases from medical images, detect fraud in financial transactions, and generate human-like text. However, these advances raise important questions about bias, accountability, and the future of work.

recipes.name: Hypothesis Tester
recipes.description: Generate hypothesis → design test → evaluate evidence → conclude
args: observation=Remote teams show lower productivity in the first month after joining

recipes.name: Tool-Use / Function-Call
recipes.description: Requires --tools (Python) — not yet supported in spl-go

recipes.name: Headline News Aggregator
recipes.description: Requires claude_cli adapter — not yet supported in spl-go

recipes.name: Bedrock Quickstart
recipes.description: Fan out to three AWS Bedrock model families — adapter smoke test for enterprise environments
args: prompt=Explain the CAP theorem in two sentences.

recipes.name: Vertex AI Quickstart
recipes.description: Fan out to three Gemini tiers on GCP Vertex AI — adapter smoke test for GCP environments
args: prompt=Explain the CAP theorem in two sentences.

recipes.name: Azure OpenAI Quickstart
recipes.description: Fan out to three Azure OpenAI deployments — adapter smoke test for Azure environments
args: prompt=Explain the CAP theorem in two sentences.

recipes.name: Human Steering
recipes.description: Requires --tools (Python) — not yet supported in spl-go

recipes.name: Knowledge Synthesis
recipes.description: Requires --tools (Python) — not yet supported in spl-go
args: raw_text=Recent advances in sparse attention mechanisms dramatically reduce transformer memory footprint while preserving model quality on long-context tasks.

recipes.name: Prompt Self-Tuning
recipes.description: Requires --tools (Python) — not yet supported in spl-go
args: failed_case=The document describes a complex quantum algorithm.

recipes.name: Adaptive Failover
recipes.description: Requires --tools (Python) — not yet supported in spl-go
args: query=Explain quantum entanglement for a technical audience.

recipes.name: Vision to Action
recipes.description: LLM classifies image description into DELIVERY/INTRUSION/IGNORE — deterministic EVALUATE decision tree
args: image_description=Image shows a package being delivered to the front door.

recipes.name: arXiv Morning Brief
recipes.description: Requires --tools (Python) — not yet supported in spl-go

recipes.name: Credit Risk Assessment
recipes.description: Requires --tools (Python) — not yet supported in spl-go
args: applicant_data=Applicant: Jane Doe | Income: $72,000 | Debt: $18,000 | Employment: 5 years | Prior defaults: none

recipes.name: Regulatory News Audit
recipes.description: Requires --tools (Python) — not yet supported in spl-go
